max_delegation_depth.hint: Limits how deep agents can delegate to each other (A→B→C = depth 2). Prevents infinite loops.

max_calls_per_agent.description: 全局统计：单个Agent可被调用的最大次数
max_calls_per_agent.hint: Limits total calls to the same agent across all callers within one event.

max_calls_per_pair.description: 单次执行中：单个Agent可调用某个Agent的最大次数
max_calls_per_pair.hint: Limits how many times agent A can call agent B in a single execution. Resets when A re-enters via a chain (A→B→C→A).

max_total_delegations.description: 全局统计：所有Agent可被调用的最大次数
max_total_delegations.hint: Hard cap on total delegation calls in one event, regardless of which agents are involved. Prevents runaway token costs.

delegation_timeout.hint: If a delegated agent takes longer than this, it will be cancelled and an error returned.

max_task_length.hint: Rejects task descriptions longer than this to prevent excessive token usage.

auto_send_trace.description: 委派完成后自动发送追踪报告
auto_send_trace.hint: When enabled, the LLM is prompted to call send_delegation_summary after completing all delegations, sending a conversation-style trace report to the user (does not enter LLM context).

disable_native_handoffs.description: 禁用原生 HandoffTools（transfer_to_* 工具）
disable_native_handoffs.hint: When enabled, native transfer_to_* HandoffTools are deactivated so the LLM can only delegate via delegate_task_to_agent. This ensures all delegations are tracked in the trace report.
